## [00:00 - 01:02]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. The BCS title game, LSU Tigers, that's good for me against Bama, not good for Oklahoma. Hey man, look, come on, you got to know this is a controversy. Look, I know the Tigers are gonna kick Bama's ass, okay? I know that for a fact. So if you're not gonna be a fan of mine because I'm pulling for the Tigers, I lived in Louisiana 29 years, I gotta go there. But who I feel most sorry for here is Oklahoma, man. I don't think this is fair. I don't think the BCS should have put Oklahoma in there. The coaches, three weeks ago we're talking about, look, this has got to be Oklahoma. Oklahoma stopped this weekend and still didn't get to place. You know and I know that the red tide ain't got a chance against the purple and yellow, okay? Go Tigers, baby, go Tigers, let's have some bannies, let's have some crawfish, and let's have some Bama for a Saturday afternoon lunch. Go Tigers!
